name: Songs of Skydale
short_description: Songs of Skydale is a pixel art adventure RPG set in the vibrant Kingdom of Skydale. Take on quests, grow stronger as you level up, and battle a diverse cast of enemies on an unforgettable journey.
detailed_description:
Songs of Skydale is an adventure game with hack-and-slash combat and RPG elements. The game starts with a classic adventure game opening when a player arrives at the Kingdom of Skydale with the hope of a new beginning for his life. Straight away, the player gets involved in various events and quests in the Kingdom of Skydale. As the game progress, the player faces different characters, items, enemies, dungeons and even some puzzles!



Songs of Skydale is a game by a player for players. The idea of the game is to give players a sense of adventure without too much hand-holding, so be prepared! When adventuring through the lands of Skydale, players must navigate using paper maps and information provided by the quest givers. If players enter uninhabited areas, they must be ready to fight against various enemies and survive until they can reach the next safe area.



The game offers fast-paced hack-and-slash style combat, which is strongly based on player skill. Correctly timed attacks, blocks and dodges are the keys to success. Combat is supported by skills and items designed to have very little restrictions. There are no classes in the game—players can choose skills freely from 19 different options. Players can choose to be a warrior, tank, mage, assassin or any mix of these. The skill system, combined with various items that can be found or purchased, gives players numerous options to shape the character stats to their liking.

KEY FEATURES

 Game Time: 6–15 hours
 Adventure RPG
 Open world
 Hack-and-slash style combat
 25 different quests
 12 different dungeons
 61 different items
 14 passive skills
 5 spells
 Paper maps
 Quick save/load
 Remappable Controls
